evals.name: courses-page-audit
evals.prompt: Audit the performance of the main courses page (src/app/cursos/page.tsx). Look for heavy components that should be lazy loaded and check for unnecessary re-renders in the list.
evals.expected_output: A report identifying heavy list items, suggesting memoization for cards, and identifying components for next/dynamic.

evals.name: image-optimization-audit
evals.prompt: Analyze how images are handled in the Hero.tsx and CourseCard.tsx components. Suggest optimizations for faster LCP and better bundle management.
evals.expected_output: Recommendations for next/image usage, priority property for LCP elements, and proper sizes attributes.

evals.name: header-navigation-audit
evals.prompt: Review the Header.tsx and its navigation components for potential state-driven re-renders. Suggest how to optimize the rendering tree.
evals.expected_output: Analysis of mobile menu state and navigation link re-renders, suggesting state colocation or memoization.
